gpa.note: UCA is accessible for a GPA 2.8 student with athletic profile. Exercise Science / Kinesiology is a well-resourced flagship department. Athletic scholarship is the primary lever.

fin.internationalNote: UCA has a strong international student recruiting history. D1 athletic scholarship combined with academic merit aid creates strong value. Arkansas cost of living is very low — $28k/yr budget stretches significantly further than California or Florida equivalents.

culture.vibe: Mid-sized regional university with strong school spirit. Conway is a growing suburb of Little Rock (20 min) — giving reasonable city access without big-city prices. UCA has a tight-knit campus community with strong athletic culture. Kinesiology and health sciences are flagship programs with dedicated student cohorts.
culture.thingsToDo: Little Rock (20 min) — state capital, Arkansas River Trail, River Market district, Clinton Presidential Center, live music. Heifer International Village. Pinnacle Mountain State Park hiking. Hot Springs National Park (1 hr). Ozark National Forest. Arkansas Razorbacks (SEC) games in Fayetteville.
culture.socialScene: Friendly Southern US campus culture. International students present through athletics and health sciences programs. Soccer team provides immediate social network. Less cosmopolitan than Florida or California options — but warm climate and low cost of living are compensators.
culture.olivierMatch: ★★★ Conway/Little Rock is warm (similar summer temps to Sydney) but not a coastal city. Culture is friendly and accessible — Southern US hospitality. Not the urban Sydney-like lifestyle of Miami or LA, but affordable warm-climate D1 with strong kinesiology. Good GPA/value option.
culture.lifestyleTags: Warm, small city adjacent, Southern campus

facilityDetails.stadium: Estes Stadium — 1,500 capacity, FieldTurf, lights. On-campus facility. Good D1 mid-major standard. Conway climate allows year-round outdoor training.
facilityDetails.trainingFields: 2 practice fields adjacent to Estes Stadium. FieldTurf and grass surfaces. Conway AR climate is warm — 9+ months outdoor training viable. Summers are hot and humid (similar to Miami).
facilityDetails.strengthConditioning: UCA Athletics Weight Room — 10,000 sq ft, fully equipped. Free weights, Olympic platforms, Hammer Strength machines. Shared across D1 varsity sports. Sports science integration developing.
facilityDetails.sportsScience: UCA Kinesiology department has dedicated exercise science labs — biomechanics, exercise physiology, and motor control labs accessible to student-athletes. GPS tracking (basic) implemented for soccer programme. Video analysis suite with Hudl.
facilityDetails.sportsMed: UCA Athletics certified athletic trainer. Strong clinical partnership with University of Arkansas for Medical Sciences (UAMS) — one of the South's leading academic medical centres. Pre-PT students have observation placement access through UAMS network. Physical therapy clinical sites in Conway and Little Rock.
facilityDetails.academicLabs: UCA Kinesiology labs: anatomy laboratory (cadavers available through UAMS partnership), biomechanics lab (Vicon motion capture basic), exercise physiology suites (VO2max, lactate, body composition). Motor Control Lab — aligns directly with ACU BESS EXSC322 motor control unit. UAMS clinical network is the strongest pre-PT asset — graduate DPT programs at UAMS are directly accessible from UCA undergraduate pathway.
facilityDetails.extras: Conway, AR — 20 min from Little Rock state capital. Pinnacle Mountain hiking (30 min). Hot Springs (1 hr — national park + thermal spas). Ozark National Forest (2 hr). Arkansas River Trail cycling. Warm climate 9+ months. Very low cost of living — $28k/yr goes significantly further than equivalent Florida or California budget.
facilityDetails.note: UCA's competitive advantage for Olivier is the UAMS clinical network — a formal academic medical centre partnership that creates a genuine pre-DPT observation and clinical placement pathway. Combined with one of the most affordable D1 price points in the guide ($28k) and warm climate, UCA is a strong value pick for a GPA-building scenario.

coach.name: Kyle Segebart
coach.title: Head Men's Soccer Coach
coach.profile: Head Men's Soccer Coach at UCA. Staff includes assistants Joe LaCasto and Will Montgomery, plus Director of Soccer Operations Travis Crane. International recruiting focus — 2025 roster draws from Europe (France, Portugal, Czech Republic, Russia, Italy, Spain, Denmark, Japan), North America, and Central America. Graduate student heavy squad with 67% of MFs clearing before 2027. UCA also runs a reserve/JV team for additional development minutes.

rec: UCA is an accessible warm-climate D1 option with a genuinely strong Kinesiology programme and the UAMS clinical network for pre-PT students. Conway is not a major city but Little Rock is 20 minutes away. The $28k/yr price point is among the best in D1. ASUN Conference provides legitimate D1 credentials. Best fit for an athlete who needs affordable D1 entry with strong academic pre-PT infrastructure and a warm climate.

minutesOutlook.trajectoryNote: Outstanding opening — 6 of 9 MFs (67%) clear before Olivier arrives, including 3 graduate students. Zero current sophomores in MF means NO 2027 seniors blocking him. Coach must recruit 4-6 central midfielders in 2026+2027 classes — Olivier can position himself as the standout international recruit for those spots. Highest MF opportunity of any D1 in the guide. High recruit risk = real competition for those open spots from the portal.

culture.olivierMatch: ★★★ Clemson is warm (South Carolina climate), has elite soccer development, and strong pre-PT degree. The campus town is small — not a city. facilityDetails.sportsScience: Full GPS tracking (Catapult), video analysis (Hudl + XOS), heart rate monitoring, lactate testing. One of the most advanced S&C setups in college soccer.
facilityDetails.academicLabs: Watt Family Innovation Center + Health Sciences facilities. Preprofessional Health Studies degree has dedicated labs. MUSC partnership creates access to world-class medical school facilities for clinical placements.
facilityDetails.sportsMed: Full-time certified AT staff, team physician, sports psychology support. Recovery facilities — hydrotherapy, cryotherapy, altitude simulation. MUSC accelerated DPT pathway gives direct clinical exposure.
facilityDetails.extras: Riggs Field atmosphere on gameday is elite. Lake Hartwell adjacent — boating, kayaking. Greenville, SC (45min) is ranked one of the best mid-size cities in the Southeast. Atlanta access. Blue Ridge hiking.
facilityDetails.note: Clemson offers one of the best overall packages in college soccer — elite facilities, elite coaching, elite degree for PT pathway, warm climate. The trade-off is a small-town setting and high competition for playing time (4 players drafted in first round in 2026 alone).

courses: HLSC 4300 — Research Methods in Health Science
rec: Clemson is elite-tier ACC soccer with 2 recent national championships and the best MLS draft pipeline of the last 2 years. The challenge: Clemson is a small college town (not a city), competition for playing time is fierce (4 first-rounders in 2026), and GPA 2.8 is borderline for admission. If Olivier can secure an athletic scholarship offer, this is among the top 3 programs in the entire guide for soccer development.

minutesOutlook.trajectoryNote: Clemson is elite — 4 players went in round 1 of the 2026 draft. MF competition is among the toughest in college soccer. Olivier would likely be a development-year player in Year 1, building toward meaningful minutes by Year 2-3. The soccer development value is exceptional but immediate minutes are not guaranteed.

If Olivier's GPA improves to 3.0+ and he can secure an athletic scholarship, Georgetown offers one of the best combinations of soccer, academics, and PT pathway in the country.

minutesOutlook.trajectoryNote: Georgetown is a perennial Big East champion with a deep, technically elite squad. MF competition is intense. Wiese recruits nationally and internationally — Olivier would need to be exceptional to break in early. Years 3-4 are the realistic peak opportunity.
